channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House Committee Orders Enhanced Security for Impeachment Witness
item.description: The House Committee on Justice has ordered heightened security measures for detainee Ramil Madriaga, a key witness in the impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte. This decision fol...

item.title: Kithure Kindiki Faces Uncertain Future as 2027 Elections Approach
item.description: Deputy President Prof Kithure Kindiki is in a delicate political position as Kenya’s 2027 General Election draws near. Appointed by President William Ruto in October 2024 after the impeachment of Riga...

item.title: US and Iran receive peace proposal amid ongoing tensions over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States and Iran have been presented with a peace framework aimed at ending hostilities, though Iran has refused to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as part of a temporary ceasefire. The proposed...

item.title: Trump sets deadline for Iran over Strait of Hormuz amid fears of limited military action
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a sharp ultimatum to Iran, demanding that Tehran reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday evening or face strikes on vital infrastructure targets. His statement spec...

item.title: Three Killed in Plateau Community as Residents Accuse Soldiers of Neglect and Unfair Treatment
item.description: For the recent incident for Nyamgo Gyel, Jos South, Plateau State, three people don die and one person dey injured after gunmen attack dem on Friday evening. The victims, wey dem dey return from Gero ...

item.title: Israel claims responsibility for killing senior commander of Iran’s Quds Force intelligence unit
item.description: According to reports from The Associated Press, Israel has claimed responsibility for the killing of a senior operative of Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). The official was reportedly a leader...

item.title: Sindh Government Launches Rs2,000 Petrol Subsidy for Eligible Motorcyclists
item.description: The Sindh government has opened registration for a Rs2,000 petrol subsidy for eligible motorcyclists as part of a broader relief package to ease the burden of rising fuel prices amid the ongoing Middl...

item.title: 26 Firearms Surrendered in Turkana as Community Supports Disarmament Drive
item.description: In Turkana County, Kenya, the National Police Service (NPS) has reported the voluntary surrender of 26 firearms as part of an ongoing disarmament drive. The latest recovery took place in Katilu and in...

item.title: FGC Kano Alumni Petition President Over Lack of Transparency in School Land PPP Deal
item.description: The Federal Government College Kano Old Students Association (FGCKOSA) don waka come dey beg President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to intervene as dem dey worried over one Public Private Partnership (PPP) land-...

item.title: Court to Rule on El-Rufai’s Bail on April 14, DSS Detains Him After Hearing
item.description: In a tense and dramatic turn of events, operatives of the Department of State Services (DSS) took former Kaduna State governor, Nasir El-Rufai, into custody shortly after a court session on his bail a...

item.title: Diesel Prices to Increase Significantly on April 7 Amid Global Oil Price Surge
item.description: Starting Tuesday, April 7, diesel prices in the Philippines are expected to rise sharply, with increases reaching up to P18.80 per liter. Petron announced it will raise diesel by P18.80 per liter, gas...

item.title: How Aigboje Aig-Imoukhuede Builds Enduring Institutions in Banking, Philanthropy and the Arts
item.description: This article profiles Aigboje Aig-Imoukhuede, a distinguished Nigerian banker, investor, and institution-builder whose career spans banking, investment, philanthropy, and cultural advocacy. Formerly t...

item.title: Proteas coach Mashimbyi disappointed by lack of centuries on New Zealand tour
item.description: Proteas Women’s head coach Mandla Mashimbyi has voiced his frustration over the team’s inability to produce centuries during their recent tour of New Zealand. Despite several solid individual performa...

item.title: Three arrested after fatal assault outside Bournemouth cocktail bar
item.description: Police in Dorset have launched a murder investigation following the death of a man outside a cocktail bar in Bournemouth early on Sunday morning. Officers were called at around 03:00 BST to reports of...

item.title: West Bengal Elections: Mamata Banerjee's Pahalgam Remark Raises Political Questions
item.description: The West Bengal political scene is seeing a whole lot of heat after Mamata Banerjee, the Chief Minister, made a reference to 'Pahalgam' during a recent public address. While the specific meaning of he...

item.title: Ten Landmark Film Scores That Transformed Cinema Music
item.description: This Guardian article explores ten pivotal film soundtracks that have redefined the role of music in cinema, tracing the artform's evolution from the silent era to modern Hollywood. It begins with the...

item.title: Apollo 16 astronaut Charlie Duke wishes Artemis II crew well ahead of their lunar flyby
item.description: Charlie Duke, the youngest person to walk on the Moon during the Apollo 16 mission, sent a heartfelt message to the Artemis II crew as they prepare for their historic journey. At 36 years old, Duke le...

item.title: Tres coches asequibles en Sudáfrica que ofrecen sensaciones premium sin el precio de lujo
item.description: El artículo analiza cómo muchos conductores sudafricanos buscan hoy en día vehículos que ofrezcan estilo, tecnología y una imagen aspiracional sin pagar los precios de las marcas de lujo tradicionales...

item.title: Prime Minister Nchemba orders fair allocation of business stalls to genuine traders
item.description: Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba has instructed government authorities in charge of business spaces across Tanzania to ensure that only legitimate traders are given stalls, and not brokers who take adva...

item.title: Political Cartoonists Reflect on This Week’s Key Events in Washington
item.description: This Politico feature presents a curated selection of political cartoons from various prominent American cartoonists, capturing the essence of the week’s political climate. Through satire and humor, t...
